name: DevOps
description: Safe shell execution, Docker sandbox testing, and self-deploy/rollback for openclaw self-modification.

productionPath.description: Absolute path to the production openclaw source repo. Default: /root/openclaw-fork

sandboxPort.description: Host port for the sandbox Docker container. Default: 18790

sandboxConfigDir.description: Isolated config directory mounted into sandbox container. Default: /root/.openclaw-sandbox

maxShellTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum allowed shell command timeout in seconds. Default: 600

autoRollbackSeconds.description: Seconds to wait after deploy before triggering auto-rollback on failure. Default: 40

requireTestsPass.description: Require pnpm test to pass before promote. Default: false (health-check only)
